task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Support Triage (AI-assisted)** (Level 9)

Build a support ticket triage system. Tickets have subject, body, from_email, category, priority, status. Use a Claude agent named 'Triage' that receives a ticket and returns a JSON object with {category, priority}. When a new ticket is POSTed, call the Triage agent to classify it before saving. Need: POST /api/tickets (auto-classifies), GET /api/tickets (list), GET /api/tickets/open.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for web
final_source:
build for web and javascript backend

owner is 'admin@support.app'
allow signup and login

database is local memory

create a Tickets table:
  subject, required
  body
  from_email
  category, default 'General'
  priority, default 'Normal'
  status, default 'open'

agent 'Triage' receives ticket:
  result = ask claude 'You categorize support tickets. Given a ticket with subject and body, return ONLY this JSON: {"category": "Bug" or "Feature Request" or "Billing" or "Account" or "General", "priority": "Critical" or "High" or "Normal" or "Low"}' with ticket returning JSON text:
    category
    priority
  send back result
  result = ask claude 'Categorize this support ticket into one of: Bug, Feature Request, Billing, Account, General. Assign priority: Critical, High, Normal, Low. Return ONLY valid JSON with this exact structure: {"category": "...", "priority": "..."}' with ticket returning JSON text:
    category
    priority
  send back result

when user requests data from /api/tickets:
  send back all Tickets

when user requests data from /api/tickets/open:
  send back all Tickets where status is 'open'

when user sends ticket_data to /api/tickets:
  requires login
  validate ticket_data:
    subject is text, required
  classification = call 'Triage' with ticket_data
  ticket_data's category is classification's category
  ticket_data's priority is classification's priority
  saved = save ticket_data as new Ticket
  send back saved with status 201

page 'Inbox' at '/':
  on page load get tickets from '/api/tickets/open'
  section 'Open Tickets':
    display tickets as table
